overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban plaza during a rainy dusk. The scene features prominent neon-lit billboards, a massive collapsed overpass structure glowing with pink neon lights, scattered debris, and various pedestrians. The atmosphere is foggy and cyberpunk-themed with wet reflective surfaces and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza entrance with digital advertising

events.description: moving past the concrete building with billboards into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza, passing digital billboards and small structures

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera toward the plaza center

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with purple and pink graphics displaying 'Chrome'
bright yellow billboard featuring a character in futuristic clothing
low concrete structure with metal roof serving as billboard mount
massive collapsed metal overpass framework with glowing pink neon tubes
row of tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza with prominent digital billboards advertising products on a small concrete building. The camera moves forward past the structure, revealing a large collapsed overpass with pink neon lights in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk through the wet concrete area as the atmosphere remains foggy and dimly lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with debris and scattered market stalls

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete to dirt and debris-covered terrain
slight turn to the right while approaching the bird statue

agents.ego_description: navigating through debris-filled plaza toward a central statue landmark

notable_agents.action: carrying a glowing red umbrella while walking toward the statue

entered.detail: large metallic bird or eagle sculpture mounted on a white concrete pedestal
small makeshift vendor stalls with tarps and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving into a wide open plaza covered in debris and dirt, the camera approaches a prominent bird statue on a pedestal. The collapsed neon structure looms larger on the right while scattered pedestrians navigate the area. Small market stalls appear on the left side as the concrete walkway gives way to rough terrain.

events.description: entering the shadow of the collapsed structure with intense pink neon illumination
passing under the main neon structure into more open area with vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive collapsed overpass, observing the neon-lit metal framework above

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking together under the neon structure

entered.detail: white tiered concrete base supporting the bird statue
exposed steel girders and framework of the collapsed overpass
bright magenta and pink fluorescent tubes running along the metal structure

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the bird statue and enters beneath the massive collapsed overpass, where bright pink neon lights illuminate the metal framework overhead. The environment shifts from open sky to semi-covered shelter as pedestrians walk through the dirt path underneath. The lighting changes dramatically to a magenta glow from the neon tubes before emerging on the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between urban structure and parkland

events.description: exiting the neon structure area and entering vegetated park space

agents.ego_description: ascending a slight hill away from the structure into a more natural area with trees

entered.detail: small dark shed or utility structure partially hidden by vegetation
tall illuminated advertisement visible on the horizon through the trees

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the neon structure, the scene transitions to a more natural environment with dirt paths and scattered vegetation. The camera moves uphill away from the plaza, leaving the collapsed overpass behind. Palm trees and other vegetation become more prominent while distant digital billboards remain visible on the horizon through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: parkland trail with scattered trees and distant urban lights

events.description: ambient light decreases as moving deeper into the park area away from neon sources

agents.ego_description: continuing through the park trail surrounded by trees and distant illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path carrying a glowing blue umbrella

entered.detail: small red-lit building or shack near the path edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the parkland area with dirt terrain and scattered palm trees. The lighting becomes darker and more natural as the neon structure is left far behind. Distant digital billboards provide the only artificial illumination as the camera follows a trail through the sparse vegetation, encountering occasional pedestrians with glowing umbrellas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban plaza that gradually transitions into a dim, vegetated parkland. It begins by moving past digital billboards on a concrete building toward a distant, collapsed overpass glowing with pink neon lights amidst a foggy atmosphere. As the camera advances into a wide, debris-strewn plaza, it passes a bird statue and market stalls before shifting from the open sky into the magenta glow of the massive metal framework overhead. The scene then emerges from beneath the structure, transitioning from the neon-lit concrete to an uphill dirt path where palm trees and sparse vegetation become more prominent. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the dark parkland, leaving the artificial lights behind to follow a trail through the foliage past pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas.
